programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: You'd Better Shop Around
programme.desc: Will withdraws from his university classes to become a successful car salesman.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Ol' Ball and Chain
programme.desc: On the day of Jazz's wedding, his bride-to-be makes sexual advances towards Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mother's Day
programme.desc: When Jazz and his wife try unsuccessfully to become pregnant, they ask for Will's help.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: While vacationing in Will's hometown, the Banks family learns a secret about Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Client
programme.desc: Will discovers that Ashley has the gift of singing and pursues a music career for her.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: What's Will Got to Do With It?
programme.desc: Will starts wheeling and dealing as Ashley's manager until she develops an enormous ego.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Grumpy Young Men
programme.desc: Will and Carlton get into a fight over a girl, but in the end their friendship prevails.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: The Return of Bobby Shaw
programme.desc: Michael must get Jr. out of a shady music contract with his arch-enemy, Bobby Shaw.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jr. and Vanessa's intentions for a simple wedding go awry when Michael and Jay step in.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: When Jay expresses that she wants more affection, Michael goes overboard.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: They Call Me El Foosay
programme.desc: An innocent game of foosball becomes an obsession for Michael.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Study Buddy
programme.desc: Jay fails an exam after Michael decides to tutor her.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Sweetheart's Day
programme.desc: Michael buys a gift for Jay based on her attitude towards him, which leads to trouble.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Boyz in the Woods
programme.desc: Wanting to have quality time with his sons, Pops invites them on a camping trip. But the brothers try to combine the family outing with a party and women.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Life Without Marlon
programme.desc: Marlon gambles away the money he collected for Pop's birthday gift and feels like a failure, until an angel reveals what life would be like without Marlon.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: A woman falls in love with her liver donor, and his selfless gesture leads to a Christmas miracle for everyone.

programme.title: Movie: Holly and Ivy
programme.desc: After her neighbour's illness returns, a woman looks for someone to renovate her house so she can adopt her children.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town
programme.desc: A woman leaves behind a life in Boston to embark on a new adventure. Unbeknownst to her, she ends up on an unexpected detour that changes both her life, and her romantic future.

programme.title: Movie: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: An interior designer returns to Utah to spearhead a hotel renovation for the annual Christmas Eve show run by her former boyfriend. When she steps in to dance in the show's finale with him, she is torn between her job, family and feelings.

programme.title: Movie: Check Inn to Christmas
programme.desc: A town's Christmas celebration is used to reunite two families to save an inn.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Graceland: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: A free-spirited former Graceland tour guide, awaiting news of her dream museum job, meets a busy single father on a Graceland tour and agrees to be his temporary nanny for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Promise
programme.desc: Two strangers who share a disdain for Christmas navigate their holiday complications together by creating The Mistletoe Promise. As they spend more time with each other, they discover there may be more to their contract.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Land
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a Christmas tree farm from her late grandmother, she decides the sensible thing to do is sell it. However, once she revisits the farm, she falls in love with the townspeople and the farm.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Rome
programme.desc: An American tour guide working in Rome agrees to give a tour to a businessman. The two quickly learn that when in Rome, love prevails.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Christmas
programme.desc: A resort developer heads to Christmas, Colorado, to scope out a new piece of land. While away, she has a minor car accident and meets the towns handsome sheriff, who helps her have a Christmas to remember.

programme.title: Movie: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: A handsome bachelor sees his life change before his eyes when he adopts a stray cat.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers
programme.desc: When their parents fall in love and decide to marry, two spoiled, middle-aged men who still live at home, are forced to grow up.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's Completely Unrehearsed Last-Minute Pandemic Holiday Special
programme.desc: America's favorite ventriloquist Jeff Dunham checks in with some of his closest friends, including Walter, Bubba J and Peanut, to see how they're holding up during the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Cartman must convince a qualifying committee that he's handicapped in order to win the Special Olympics. Meanwhile, Jimmy is determined to win the Olympics at any cost.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: South Park: Fun With Veal
programme.desc: Stan is appalled when he realizes the veal he's been eating is, in fact, the meat from little baby calves. He goes to great lengths to rescue calves from the slaughterhouse, and a standoff with the Park County Police Department ensues.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: A record company steals Chef's song 'Stinky Britches' and he sues them for the rights. When Johnny Cochrane defends the record company, Chef is left penniless. But he has some very famous and talented friends who want to help their old mentor.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: South Park: Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Cartman convinces the boys to toilet paper their teacher's house. But when Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt for the horrendous prank, Cartman tries to kill him.

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure
programme.desc: To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival factions.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: See One, Do One, Teach One
programme.desc: Detective Rizzoli and medical examiner Isles investigate the grisly murder of a wealthy couple. The M.O. matches the work of a serial killer known as the Surgeon. Now that the Surgeon is behind bars, it seems a protégé is picking up where he left off.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Boston Strangler Redux
programme.desc: Tensions are high as the squad investigates a possible copycat of the legendary Boston Strangler.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sympathy for the Devil
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate the mysterious death of a young boy who may have died during an attempted exorcism.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: She Works Hard for the Money
programme.desc: After a student is gunned down in broad daylight, the investigation reveals she had more than a few secrets. Meanwhile, Jane's mother Angela gets into a spat with her father over the car.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: The eldest brother in a Boston Brahmin family is found in the harbour dead after an apparent sailing accident. Maura's close connection with the family and Jane's resentment over their wealth threaten to derail the investigation.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I Kissed a Girl
programme.desc: Jane and Maura investigate what appears to be a hate crime: the brutal assault and murder of a woman leaving a lesbian bar. With Jane going undercover, they hope to lure the killer out in the open.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Born to Run
programme.desc: The Boston Marathon turns into a crime scene when a shooter begins targeting runners. Racing to catch the killer before another shooting, Jane and Maura must conduct their investigation in secret to avoid panic.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: I'm Your Boogie Man
programme.desc: A body discovered in a park appears to be the work of Charles Hoyt, the imprisoned serial killer who once abducted and nearly murdered Jane. As Maura struggles to get inside the mind of the killer, Jane must keep her fear in check.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Murderous Millionaire
programme.desc: After young mother and high-end escort Georgina Symonds goes missing, police discover one of her obsessed clients is responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Deadly Double Life
programme.desc: Barry Odom wasn’t one to make enemies, but after he’s executed just outside his apartment complex, investigators uncover not one but two love triangles, leading them to the front door of a scorned lover who was willing to kill for love.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: On the surface, Shannon and Eddie Baugus seemed to have the perfect marriage until a deadly confrontation exposed a dark history of domestic abuse.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: Sandee Rozzo is preparing to face her attacker at court when she’s gunned down in her garage. The culprit seems obvious, but as detectives dig deeper, they learn nothing about this case is cut and dry.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Fatal Love Triangle
programme.desc: A teen rivalry turns deadly when Rachel Wade and Sarah Ludemann both fall in love with charismatic bad boy Josh Camacho.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When Mary Ann Langley finds her husband James nearly burned to death in their home, investigators must race to determine if it was an accident or assault before they lose him.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: When Rhoni Reuter, the pregnant girlfriend of Chicago Bears legend Shaun Gayle, is shot to death in her home, investigators are faced with a long list of romantic rivals as suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms
programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Sinister Surveillance
programme.desc: When a Tennessee man is shot down in front of his own home, police use home video to unravel the history of a vicious feud between rural neighbours and determine if the shooting was self-defence or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deerly Departed
programme.desc: A night of shooting begins in a quiet suburb, and when police speak to the man responsible they find he became unraveled over the sight of a few too many deer.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: When Jason Horsley is gunned down in front of his home, investigators discover evidence of a neighbor’s deadly plotting, but it would take six years to track the killer down.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Poison Mastermind
programme.desc: When tensions boil over between neighbours in small-town Florida, a local waitress and her family fall victim to a poisoning, and investigators must track down the mastermind behind one of the most cunning murder plots they’ve ever seen.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: We're Marooned
programme.desc: While transporting calves to the Head of the Bay by boat, Otto, Charlotte and August are marooned. Still struggling with PTSD, Atz Lee works with his son Etienne to finish the insulation on his backcountry build and Jewel visits the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Land of the Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The Kilchers take advantage of the high summer's extra daylight to forge ahead. Atz Lee uses a helicopter to haul in vital equipment. Jane and Charlotte battle an angry nest of wasps, while Eivin fells trees and clears land for an upgraded chicken coop.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Kilcher Kritters
programme.desc: Episodes of 'Alaska: The Last Frontier' with tweets, facts, and frontier extras.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Kilcher Cookbook
programme.desc: The key to pioneering success is true mastery of wilderness cuisine. Finding food on the frontier is not just about survival, however, it's an art form. The Kilchers share their most loved homestead recipes including a pie made entirely from bear parts.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Tsunami Evacuation
programme.desc: An earthquake strikes Homer, triggering a tsunami warning and evacuation. Eivin and Eve traverse treacherous mountain terrain on their first-ever goat hunt and Charlotte creates a special memorial for victims of COVID-19.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Very Kilcher Christmas
programme.desc: 'Tis the season on the homestead for the Kilchers to create homemade gifts for their significant others. Otto surprises with an explosive gift to Charlotte and Jane builds a musical present for Atz Lee.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Kilcher Cookbook
programme.desc: The key to pioneering success is true mastery of wilderness cuisine. Finding food on the frontier is not just about survival, however, it's an art form. The Kilchers share their most loved homestead recipes including a pie made entirely from bear parts.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Tsunami Evacuation
programme.desc: An earthquake strikes Homer, triggering a tsunami warning and evacuation. Eivin and Eve traverse treacherous mountain terrain on their first-ever goat hunt and Charlotte creates a special memorial for victims of COVID-19.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Very Kilcher Christmas
programme.desc: 'Tis the season on the homestead for the Kilchers to create homemade gifts for their significant others. Otto surprises with an explosive gift to Charlotte and Jane builds a musical present for Atz Lee.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: NPK: Grudge Night Maryland
programme.desc: Grudge Night begins as racers prepare to do battle while learning everything they can about a new track. The 405 and Texas plan to keep their data to themselves, leaving racers without teams struggling to keep up.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: Grudge Night New Hampshire
programme.desc: NOLA makes moves on the 405 and Lizzy Musi joins Grudge Night for the first time. After getting rained out, Ryan and Giuseppe prepare to race in the finals.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Awesome Aussies and Olds
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron find a '55 Chevy Bel Air and 1950 Oldsmobile Coupe Rocket 88 that's been stored for over 50 years.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast and Furious Fairmont
programme.desc: An ugly 1978 Ford Fairmont is turned into a cool, mirrored drift car. Richard flips a rare 1967 Corvette Stingray.

programme.title: American Trucks: Truck Wild
programme.desc: Erik McGregor and Ryan Bush fix up classic trucks.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dale Jr.'s Sick Nomad
programme.desc: The Gas Monkey crew build NASCAR royalty Dale Earnhardt Jr. a 1956 Chevy Nomad. While Richard and Aaron travel to Dale Jr's Carolina home with the Nomad, the crew finds ways to cool off in the Texas heat.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped Cabriolet and 'Vette Rescue
programme.desc: The crew helps a widow by buying her husband's Ford '32 Cabriolet and many hot rod projects. They rescue an heirloom '62 Corvette from a garage falling down around it, but not all the family is pleased Richard has it. Richard makes a big announcement.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Troll's Choice Rolls-Royce
programme.desc: When Richard 'accidentally' buys $92K worth of cars at an auction, his bookkeeper sister insists he flip all five cars in one week. Some go more easily and profitably than others but it's a weirdly built Rolls Royce that even Aaron has a hard time fixing.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cool Customline
programme.desc: KC's beloved but broken down '55 Ford Customline gets new life and Richard needs to flip it to Shark Tank's Mark Cuban. George Foreman takes off with Richard's prize Mustang while Richard and Dennis haggle with a WWII vet over a '38 Aston Martin.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '71 Cool Kingwood/ Retro Replicar
programme.desc: Aaron and crew turn an ugly duckling '71 Chevy Kingwood station wagon into the cool '70s hot rod dragster it was meant to be. Richard pries a 1980 MG Replicar from a husband reluctant to part with it. The Grill books its first musical act.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Low Riding Lincoln
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron turn a 1970 Lincoln Continental Mark III into a muscle car and picks up a 1970's style hot rod kit car with a mysterious past.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Shame on You
programme.desc: Hiding a secret, Tarik waits for Hazel to arrive from the Philippines. Brandon's mom presses Julia about birth control. Mike impresses Natalie on her first night in the US. Zied calls Rebecca with unnerving news. Jovi shows Yara New Orleans.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Bless This Mess
programme.desc: Julia pushes Brandon to confront his parents. After meeting Jovi's mom, Yara feels more uncomfortable. Andrew wants his French fiancé in the US. Hazel is surprised by Tarik's living conditions. Natalie is unsure about Mike's home in the woods.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What's Mine is Mine
programme.desc: Mike fails to make Natalie feel at home. Stephanie worries her secret will ruin her relationship. Zied questions leaving his parents. Jovi and Yara have a blow up. Julia has a rough day on the farm. Andrew learns shocking news about Amira.

programme.title: Unexpected: Worst. Birthday. EVER.
programme.desc: Jenna only wanted one thing for her birthday: a car. Away at college, Tyra receives devastating news. Taron and Reanna accuse each other of cheating weeks before she is due. Myrka and Ethan get an ultrasound, but no one gets to know the baby's gender yet.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What's Mine is Mine
programme.desc: Mike fails to make Natalie feel at home. Stephanie worries her secret will ruin her relationship. Zied questions leaving his parents. Jovi and Yara have a blow up. Julia has a rough day on the farm. Andrew learns shocking news about Amira.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Friend or Boyfriend?
programme.desc: Moriah decides that it's time to keep her promise to Max, and she introduces him to her family. Ethan and Olivia continue to mend their marriage, but Olivia is crushed when she hears some disappointing news.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Moment of Doubt
programme.desc: Ethan and Olivia plan to get couples tattoos, but Ethan isn't sure he's ready. Kim and Barry miss their son Joshua and hope to bridge the gap with the older kids. Max and Moriah hang out as 'just friends' but can't deny their feelings for each other.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Thorn in the Bride's Side
programme.desc: Miss USA Erin Brady is ready to find her dream dress, but she must also please her mother-in-law.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Design Intervention
programme.desc: Patti Ann goes to Chicago to find the perfect dress for her destination wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bling, Lace and Cleavage!
programme.desc: Krystle loves attention, but her friends may not agree on her over-the-top sexy dress. Maria wants a pure white princess or mermaid gown, but shocks her pastor father with a sexy sheer bodice. Jaclyn faces a major dress dilemma.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Afraid to Try New Things

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This Cyst Persists

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sisters Lumpity Lump Lump

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Jackpot

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Record Breaking Lump!

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Warning: Cystem Shutdown!

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Mic Drop Pop!

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Night Shift

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Family Secret

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Sunday Morning Slasher
programme.desc: Police in Ann Arbor, Detroit and Houston attempt to catch Coral Eugene Watts, whom they suspect is a serial killer. Their attempts are fruitless, but he is caught when two of his victims don't die, who identify him. He then confesses to 13 murders.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: The Case That Haunts Me I

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: The Case That Haunts Me II
programme.desc: In Atlanta, investigators are haunted by the gruesome rape and murder of two women; in New Orleans, detectives search for suspects who drowned a local couple; in Harris County, a woman who was badly burned struggles to survive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Halloween Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a Halloween-themed party and surprise each other with elaborate costumes. They're joined by Kane Hodder, aka Jason Voorhees.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Eggplant Parm Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe dish out some wild stories with actress Jillian Bell and devour the perfect parmigiana cooked by Chef Dom Dibartolomeo.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Weekend Plans

programme.desc: The Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Human Piñata

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cliff Face Crisis
programme.desc: A horrific rock climbing accident on Cannon Cliffs sends two officers and an emergency team on a heroic helicopter rescue mission. A combative man is found illegally ridding an OHRV and is questioned by Officer Crouse, and a moose causes a traffic jam.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: A team of officers stakeout hunting sites across New Hampshire after reports of illegal activity. Officer Lopashanski investigates the mysterious discovery of untagged, unregistered deer parts hanging in front of a burnt-out building.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trapped
programme.desc: Officer MacFadzen tracks a trapper suspected of poaching, and stealing a trail camera surveying the illegal traps. Officer Lucas investigates the death of an owl. And, officers question a father and son who may have hunted over illegal bait.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Lake Collision
programme.desc: Officer Bronson investigates a teen's social media post, boasting of illegally shooting a deer. Officer Canfield confronts a hunter over multiple violations. And, the dive team searches for a boat and its driver after a collision with another boat.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Taking the Bait
programme.desc: Officer Masucci and Major Walsh join forces to summon a man for baiting without a permit. Officer Bronson pursues a pair of ATV speedsters riding with a toddler with no safety gear, and Lieutenant Cheney responds to a call about a deer wedged in a fence.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Backseat Bear
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre and Arsenault confront a bear that has made its winter den in a car. Officer McKee investigates a claim that an illegal deer kill was an accident. Lt. Boudreau stops a family of snowmobilers riding illegally on a highway.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Texas game wardens protect the natural resources of their vast state while fighting crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Untold Stories
programme.desc: When a bear cub is found camping in a treehouse, Officer Egan responds to the call. Officer Bronson and Lucas ticket a man for multiple violations while riding an OHRV, and Officer Matson searches for a malnourished fawn.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Backseat Bear
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre and Arsenault confront a bear that has made its winter den in a car. Officer McKee investigates a claim that an illegal deer kill was an accident. Lt. Boudreau stops a family of snowmobilers riding illegally on a highway.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Taking the Bait
programme.desc: Officer Masucci and Major Walsh join forces to summon a man for baiting without a permit. Officer Bronson pursues a pair of ATV speedsters riding with a toddler with no safety gear, and Lieutenant Cheney responds to a call about a deer wedged in a fence.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Untold Stories
programme.desc: When a bear cub is found camping in a treehouse, Officer Egan responds to the call. Officer Bronson and Lucas ticket a man for multiple violations while riding an OHRV, and Officer Matson searches for a malnourished fawn.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Weed It and Reap
programme.desc: Harvest season is the game wardens' busiest time. Warden Dudley helps an Amish family save their corn crop from a bear. Wardens Carter and McBrine hunt for a man hiding out in a cabin. Sergeant Thrasher searches for an illegal marijuana crop grower.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Crime of the Century
programme.desc: Sergeant Simmons and the team search for the suspect of a heinous deer poaching case.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With temperatures dropping, wardens watch the Canadian border for illegal hunting.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: New Frontiers, New Threats
programme.desc: Spring arrives early in Alaska and the Kilchers are forced to prepare their homestead. And 3,000 miles away, Idaho's River of No Return roars back to life and the people who live on its shores must navigate the raging spring rapids.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Rusted and Busted
programme.desc: Otto surveys the condition of his rusting barge after a winter in drydock, while Eivin and Eve use explosives to clear land for a new root cellar. And later, Jane builds an innovative dogsled for Atz Lee.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Bears Descend
programme.desc: In preparation for the spring cattle drive, Atz Lee, Otto and August survey the homestead for signs of bears and employ modern surveillance to track their movement. Eivin and Eve take the kids on a kelp-harvesting expedition and Atz Sr. goes bear hunting.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Boat Rescue Mission
programme.desc: While collecting coal on the beach after a storm, Eivin and Eve find a capsized boat and immediately begin looking for survivors. Otto, Charlotte and August build a shelter for their calves and Jane brings the family together with a new spring tradition.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Greener Pastures
programme.desc: With predators stalking the homestead, the need for safe grazing land for cattle is greater than ever. Atz Sr and Atz Lee head to Perl Island to begin plans for new pasture, while Otto and Eivin set to work transporting a small herd to the island by boat.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Otto's Surprise
programme.desc: When Jane and Charlotte get word of a sick calf at the Head of the Bay, they trek through bear country to protect their herd. Three generations of Kilchers build a line shack on Perl Island, and Otto has a surprise for Charlotte.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Having a Blast
programme.desc: The Kilchers use dynamite to blast a section of their main road and improve access to the homestead. Jane and Charlotte brave muddy bogs for good fishing, and a risky salvage mission goes wrong.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Making Hay the Kilcher Way
programme.desc: Eivin and August build a new hay haler. Charlotte and Otto celebrate their 25th anniversary.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Homestead Haul
programme.desc: Eivin hauls a huge pole barn to his homestead. Jewel arrives for a visit. August builds a one-of-a-kind outhouse.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Tangled in the Tide
programme.desc: Eivin and Atz Sr. get tangled in a mooring line as the tide comes in, pushing Eivin's boat towards the rocky beach. Atz Lee and Jane teach the next generation of Kilchers how to fish. Otto and Charlotte give Eve the gift of a lifetime.

programme.title: Movie: When the Bough Breaks
programme.desc: A couple, desperate to have a baby, hires a surrogate mother. After taking her into their home, they discover she has a dangerous obsession with the husband. They are caught in her deadly game, and have to fight for their lives and their future.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Acrimony
programme.desc: Although their marriage has long ago lost its spark, Melinda has remained nothing but loyal to Robert, so when she discovers that she's been betrayed her feelings of rage become overwhelming, driving her to destroy his life and get her revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Sleepless
programme.desc: A dirty police detective's secret life is exposed when he and his partner steal cocaine from a powerful and ruthless drug lord. They kidnap his son and Vincent is forced to search for him while evading internal affairs. He risks everything for his family.

programme.title: Martin: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: The gang decides to hold a contest to see which gender is the better cook at Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Martin: Lockin' Boots
programme.desc: Martin finds out about a withdrawal Gina made from their bank account to pay a ticket.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cornering the Colonel

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tag Team

programme.title: Pawn Stars: E Equals MC Pawn

programme.title: Mom: Wind Chimes and a Bottomless Pit of Sadness
programme.desc: Christy, Bonnie, Jill and Wendy get high after accidentally eating cookies filled with pot.

programme.title: Mom: A Bouncy Castle and An Aneurysm
programme.desc: When Bonnie connects with a handsome, sober stranger, Christy worries that she's jeopardizing her relationship with Adam.

programme.title: Mom: Roast Chicken and a Funny Story
programme.desc: When a heartbroken Bonnie drives everyone crazy, Christy begs Adam to take her back.

programme.title: Mom: Night Swimmin' and An English Muffin
programme.desc: When Bonnie discovers Adam is still close with his ex-wife, Christy worries the emotional fallout could jeopardize Bonnie's sobriety.

programme.title: Mom: Martinis and a Sponge Bath
programme.desc: When Christy and Adam get into a car accident, Bonnie is hurt to discover she is neither of their emergency contacts.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Real World
programme.desc: When Bow reconnects with her college friends on Facebook, she invites them over for an elaborate dinner party and tries to impress them. On the night of the party, Dre ends up learning a lot of new information about Bow's past.

programme.title: Black-ish: Switch Hitting
programme.desc: When super cool and white exec Jay Sloane challenges Dre over his street cred and picks inept Charlie for a big urban market account, Dre finds himself questioning his 'blackness.' Pops gets a letter from the IRS and fears the worst.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Peer-ent Trap
programme.desc: Teenager Zoey goes through a mini-rebellion phase by pushing boundaries and acting out. Dre wants to lay down the law while Bow insists on a softer approach like her mom did with her.

programme.title: Movie: Buried
programme.desc: A man wakes up to find that he is buried alive inside a coffin with only a lighter, a cell phone and a small amount of air. The race is on as he frantically makes calls for help.

programme.title: Movie: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: When the Deepwater Horizon drilling rig explodes, the crew suddenly finds the building collapsing around them. Crew member Mike Williams, thinking of his family, fights to escape the rig alive. The crew works together to save as many as they can.

programme.title: Movie: Baby Driver
programme.desc: A young man with a hearing problem constantly listens to music to drown out the ringing in his ears. He works as a getaway driver for a crime lord's gang, but when he meets a girl who seems to understand him he vows that his next job will be his last.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Rings of Akhaten
programme.desc: On the rings of the planet Akhaten, the Festival of Offerings is in full swing. Clara meets the Queen of Years but something is stirring in the pyramid, and a sacrifice will be demanded.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Cold War
programme.desc: The Doctor and Clara land on a submarine in 1983 as it spirals into the ocean depths with an alien creature loose. With tempers flaring and nuclear weapons on board, the whole of humanity is at stake.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Hide
programme.desc: Something terrifying is hiding in Caliburn House and the Doctor finds himself part of the ghost hunt.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Journey to the Centre of the TARDIS
programme.desc: When the TARDIS crashes, Clara is lost inside and the Doctor only has 30 minutes before the ship explodes.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Crimson Horror
programme.desc: Something ghastly is afoot in Victorian Yorkshire, as bodies are found with their skin a waxy, glowing red.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Nightmare in Silver
programme.desc: Hedgewick’s World of Wonders: the perfect theme park day out. And ground zero for a deadly silver resurrection.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Name of the Doctor
programme.desc: Clara is summoned to an impossible conference call, alerting her that the deadly Whisper Men are closing in on Vastra, Jenny and Strax. Someone is kidnapping the Doctor's friends, leading him toward the one place in all of time and space he should not go.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Deep Breath
programme.desc: Clara is alone in Victorian London with a man she doesn't know, a dinosaur in the Thames, and a spate of deadly spontaneous combustions. The Doctor has changed. It's time you knew him.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Listen
programme.desc: Ghosts of the past and future crowd into the lives of the Doctor and Clara and send them on an adventure that takes them to the end of the universe.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Time Heist
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to break into the most dangerous bank in the cosmos.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Caretaker
programme.desc: The terrifying Skovox Blitzer is ready to destroy all humanity and worse, any second now, Danny Pink and the Doctor are going to meet.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Magician's Apprentice
programme.desc: When the skies of Earth are frozen by a mysterious alien force, Clara needs her friend, but no one can find the Doctor. As past deeds come back to haunt him, old enemies will come face-to-face.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Witch's Familiar
programme.desc: Trapped and alone in a terrifying Dalek city, the Doctor is at the heart of an evil Empire; no sonic, no TARDIS, nobody to help. With his greatest temptation before him, he must try hard to resist.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Under the Lake
programme.desc: When an underwater base comes under attack, the Doctor and Clara must save the frightened crew and defeat an impossible threat. They must figure out what is behind these events and if the crew can really be haunted by ghosts.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Before the Flood
programme.desc: On a remote Army outpost, a fearsome alien warlord, the Fisher King, sets in motion a twisted plan to ensure his own survival. The ripples will be felt around the universe.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Girl Who Died
programme.desc: Captured by Vikings, the Doctor and Clara must help protect their village from space warriors from the future.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Woman Who Lived
programme.desc: The deadly Highwayman, 'The Knightmare,' and his sidekick stalk the dark streets of London in 1651. But when they find loot that's not of this world, they come face to face with the Doctor. He must find out who the Knightmare is in league with.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Zygon Invasion
programme.desc: The Zygons, a race of shape shifting aliens, have been living in secret amongst us on Earth, until now. When Osgood is kidnapped by a gang of Zygons, the Doctor, Clara and UNIT must scatter across the world in a bid to set her free.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Zygon Inversion
programme.desc: Shape shifting Zygons are everywhere in the UK, and there is no way of knowing who to trust. With UNIT neutralized, only the Doctor stands in their way but he's unsure of how to save his friends and stop the war.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Sleep No More
programme.desc: This terrifying story is assembled from footage discovered in the wreckage of Le Verrier Space Station.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Face the Raven
programme.desc: The Doctor and Clara, with their old friend Rigsy, find themselves in a magical alien world, hidden on a street in the heart of London. Sheltered within are some of the most fearsome creatures of the universe and Ashildr.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: Trapped in a world unlike any other he has seen, the Doctor faces the greatest challenge of his many lives. Pursued by the fearsome creature known only as the Veil, he must attempt the impossible.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Hell Bent
programme.desc: A Time Lord known as the Doctor uses the TARDIS to aid others throughout time and space.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: In the '90s, new attitudes and new technology equal more freedom, more fragmentation, more diversity, but also more conflict.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Lift Off
programme.desc: See how the '80s created our modern world including the revolution in personal entertainment brought on by Pac-Man and Sony Walkmans while a new kid on the block defined a new musical era - spelled 'MTV.'

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: The Revolutionaries
programme.desc: Reagan's business mandate leads to a new breed of entrepreneurs, including Steve Jobs, whose '1984' ad helped launch the Super Bowl commercial craze and Ted Turner, who invented the 24-hour news network.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Shop 'Til You Drop
programme.desc: Glamour finds a new poster girl in the 1980s, when a young singer is launched to stardom with a shocking performance of 'Like a Virgin' at the first MTV Music Video Awards inspiring girls across the globe to hit the mall.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: With the motto 'greed is good,' Gordon Gekko desires excess and ambition in 'Wall Street' while traders mirror his bad behaviour in real life. CEOs see their salaries rise while women fight to overcome office boys' clubs.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Tear Down These Walls
programme.desc: Though the 1980s were known for its 'greed is good' mantra, the decade also saw its fair share of literal and cultural walls brought down, as Americans united on political, racial and health issues.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Super Power
programme.desc: At the end of the 1980s American pop culture goes global and helps bring down the Iron Curtain, leaving America as the world's sole superpower.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mini Moo!: North Pol Express
programme.desc: Watch previous episodes in a condensed format.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Full Stream Ahead
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores Discovery's brand-new streaming platform, discovery+, with some of its biggest stars including David Schwimmer, Mike Rowe, Faruq Tauheed of Battlebots as well as Freddy Dodge and Juan Ibarra from Gold Rush.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Full Stream Ahead
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores Discovery's brand-new streaming platform, discovery+, with some of its biggest stars including David Schwimmer, Mike Rowe, Faruq Tauheed of Battlebots as well as Freddy Dodge and Juan Ibarra from Gold Rush.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Curse of the Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: Mysterious crystal skulls could be long-lost relics of Aztec and Maya civilizations that grant supernatural powers, according to some; experts investigate new leads to reveal if these strange objects are genuine artifacts or if they're modern-day fakes.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: American Monster: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Family and faith have always been important to Richard Beasley, as these home videos show. Which is why it's so scary when one day - the Ohio man vanishes. Especially after police discover that an online monster has been luring local men to their deaths.

programme.title: American Monster: Have You Seen This Woman?
programme.desc: Rebecca and Ken Pierce film themselves raising their four kids in idyllic rural Oklahoma. But the family is haunted by a specter of addiction and violence across generations that will leave two of them brutally murdered, and the family destroyed.

programme.title: American Monster: By God, That's Enough
programme.desc: When single mom Michelle Chaffin finds love, it seems like the perfect case of opposites attract. But when Michelle vanishes without a trace, police uncover a terrible jealousy revealed through a shocking confession that leaves her family reeling.

programme.title: American Monster: Plus-One
programme.desc: When Melissa and Rob find love at a birthday BBQ, everything seems to have fallen into place. But as Rob works longer hours, Melissa is left with an uneasy feeling. When tensions flare not even the happiest of proposals can save them from devastation.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: When, Where and Who?
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old girl vanishes from her front porch, police must uncover when she was last seen, where she might have been going, and who would have wanted her dead.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Evidence Never Lies
programme.desc: A young woman is found drowned in her bathtub and the evidence at the crime scene indicates her killer was someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: American Monster: Plus-One
programme.desc: When Melissa and Rob find love at a birthday BBQ, everything seems to have fallen into place. But as Rob works longer hours, Melissa is left with an uneasy feeling. When tensions flare not even the happiest of proposals can save them from devastation.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: When, Where and Who?
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old girl vanishes from her front porch, police must uncover when she was last seen, where she might have been going, and who would have wanted her dead.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Daughter's Quest
programme.desc: A young woman's search for her birth mother ultimately leads her on a quest for justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lurking in the Hollers
programme.desc: Family means everything to folks who live in the mountain hollers of Townsend, Tennessee. When one member of the large Griffin clan is found murdered and another goes missing, investigators begin to suspect that a family feud may have taken a deadly turn.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: He'd Do It Again
programme.desc: When the well-liked South Bend native, Tim Moore, seemingly vanishes one cold November night, residents begin to realize they may not know the folks next door as well as they thought.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Night Stalker Attacks
programme.desc: When Cindy Borton is found brutally stabbed to death in her home, authorities immediately suspect those closest to her. But a note left at the site of a local arson lights a trail that turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Message in Red
programme.desc: When a beloved couple is gunned down in the presence of children, a cryptic message scrawled across the home leads police to suspect the crime may be drug related. The only problem is, there's no evidence the victims had any involvement in the drug trade.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Say it Ain't So
programme.desc: The Long Branch Saloon is the local hangout for most everyone in the small town of Poteau, Oklahoma. That is until its beloved proprietor goes missing, leaving behind a splatter of blood and many unanswered questions.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: A Place She'd Call Home
programme.desc: Police are baffled when Melissa White is found murdered in the backyard of her Viola, Illinois home. But when investigators take a closer look at Melissa's neighbors, they unearth a secret. Could this be the key to apprehending Melissa's murderer?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: No Witnesses
programme.desc: When two young ladies don't return home after a run to the local drive-thru, their concerned parents immediately set out on a search to find them. However it will be a fisherman that will give police their first clue that something evil has happened.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: Two neighbors in New Brighton, Minnesota get along great until one of them catches Lyme Disease from the deer the other feeds on his property. The ensuing blame game, hostility and rising conflict ends in gunfire, death, injury and ruin.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Family Values
programme.desc: A woman who still lives in her family home befriends her new neighbours, only to be plunged into a nightmare of threats, violence and betrayal. When her brother steps up to protect her, blood will be spilled and lives forever shattered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: A wealthy executive comes into conflict with his neighbors when he forbids them access to his extensive lands. One local handyman fights to keep the roads and trails open for all, a struggle that ends when one man lies dead.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Games of Homes
programme.desc: New neighbours disrupt the harmony that has existed between residents for years. Alliances change and terror reigns until a winter storm puts a bloody end to the feud.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Armor
programme.desc: An in-depth, action-packed look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.desc: After renting vacation homes in Narragansett, Rhode Island, for many years, a couple finally buys a place of their own that needs a lot of work. Luckily he is a general contractor and ready to take on the challenge.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cleveland, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Campfire Creations
programme.desc: Noah follows smoke signals to the fairground. He chows down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Nacho, Nacho Man
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Garlic's Angels
programme.desc: Noah Cappe packs his breath mints and heads to the South Florida Garlic Festival in Delray Beach, Fla., where the stinking rose makes an appearance in fair foods like the claw cake burger and mojo pork pockets.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Mexican Fiesta
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best south-of-the-border flavors in the USA, with a combination of spices, fresh ingredients and traditional cooking styles unlike anything else.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.
