programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Magical Baby / Loveys On the Loose
programme.desc: Professor Peacock's latest invention of robotic loveys cause havoc and threaten the babies’ deliveries. Freddy believes baby Narwhal Nathan is magical.

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Grannies / Yoga Ball / Calypso
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have a question for their Nana; Mum teaches Bingo how to use her bark; Bluey and her friends learn from their teacher, Calypso.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: A Pete Scorned
programme.desc: Mickey attempts to help Peg Leg Pete after a new bully shows up and steals his mojo.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Troublemaker
programme.desc: Jagged Stone's assistant Penny gets akumatized into Troublemaker. She used to solve other people's problems, now she's going to cause all the problems.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Gigantitan
programme.desc: A giant baby criss-crosses Paris looking for a lollipop.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Riposte
programme.desc: A mysterious masked fencer gets akumatized into Riposte. Armed with her saber, she wants to get revenge on Adrien, who unintentionally humiliated her. To protect him, Ladybug will have to cross swords with the villain!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Befana
programme.desc: Marinette's grandmother gets akumatized. Now Befana, she wants to get revenge on Marinette who would rather spend time with her friends than with her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Hoop Streams
programme.desc: When the school's basketball team makes it to the National Championship, Tess rallies everyone to help her host a live telethon to raise funds for the team to travel.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Slammed

programme.title: Raven's Home: On Edge
programme.desc: When Mr. Arthur tells Booker that he isn't ready to go from sweeping floors to cutting hair at the barbershop, Booker opens his own mobile barbershop in the boys' school bathroom.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Story So-fa
programme.desc: When Nia and Levi surprise their moms with a new couch and donate the old one, Raven and Chelsea reveal that they stored Chelsea's settlement money in the cushions.

programme.title: Raven's Home: What About Your Friends?
programme.desc: When Booker’s new friends try to influence him to try vaping, he turns them down, however later takes the fall when they get caught and claim that the vape pen belongs to Booker.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Live From Camp Kikiwaka
programme.desc: When the kids realize how outdated the Camp Kikiwaka website is, they decide to do a live stream to show people how great the camp is.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: NCIS: Crescent City
programme.desc: When the body of Congressman Dan McLane washes ashore in New Orleans, Gibbs reunites with his former colleague in a joint case between the two field offices and the FBI. The teams must work together to determine if the murder was politically based.

programme.title: NCIS: Page Not Found
programme.desc: After returning to her job at the Department of Defense, McGee's girlfriend Delilah finds a break in a controversial case, prompting her to turn to the team for help. Meanwhile, McGee talks to DiNozzo about whether he should ask Delilah to move in.

programme.desc: When a Marine photographer disappears prior to providing his testimony in an Army court-martial hearing, the NCIS team investigates both the murder he witnessed as well as his current piece on military veterans who are homeless.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Wrong Side of the Bars
programme.desc: Antonio's son was kidnapped, and he has a feeling the Columbian drug gang is to blame. The Columbian gang leader is being held in jail and suggests his release may trigger the release of Diego.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chin Check
programme.desc: After the discovery of large amounts of cop killer ammo, the Intelligence Unit is in a quest to find the source.

programme.desc: A ménage à trois ends in murder and the only clues the police have to the girl's identity are a pair of emerald earrings.

programme.title: Snapped: Traci Wolfe

programme.desc: Christy helps Jill adjust to being a new foster mother and Bonnie has trouble convincing tenants that she's a good building manager.

programme.title: Mom: Tush Push and Some Radishes
programme.desc: Following the death of Bonnie's mother, Christy and Bonnie learn that she kept a very big secret.

programme.title: Mom: Tantric Sex and the Sprouted Flute
programme.desc: Christy annoys everyone when she adopts her new boyfriend Brad's healthy lifestyle, and Bonnie and Adam decide to take the next step in their relationship.

programme.title: Mom: A Cricket and a Hedge Made of Gold
programme.desc: When Marjorie takes a break from the group, Bonnie becomes the go-to for everyone's problems and Christy tries to overcome a painful memory from her past.

programme.title: Movie: Buried
programme.desc: A man wakes up to find that he is buried alive inside a coffin with only a lighter, a cell phone and a small amount of air. The race is on as he frantically makes calls for help.

programme.title: Movie: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: When the Deepwater Horizon drilling rig explodes, the crew suddenly finds the building collapsing around them. Crew member Mike Williams, thinking of his family, fights to escape the rig alive. The crew works together to save as many as they can.

programme.title: Movie: Baby Driver
programme.desc: A young man with a hearing problem constantly listens to music to drown out the ringing in his ears. He works as a getaway driver for a crime lord's gang, but when he meets a girl who seems to understand him he vows that his next job will be his last.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Hell Bent
programme.desc: A Time Lord known as the Doctor uses the TARDIS to aid others throughout time and space.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Pilot
programme.desc: A chance encounter with a girl with a star in her eye leads to a terrifying chase across time and space. Bill's mind is opened to a Universe that is bigger and more exciting than she could possibly have imagined.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Smile
programme.desc: The Doctor and Bill find the colonists missing when they visit a spectacular city on a distant planet. The mystery may be connected to a band of 'cute' droids.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Thin Ice
programme.desc: London, 1814. The entire city has turned out for the biggest Frost Fair in decades! But beneath the Thames, revelers are disappearing, snatched through the ice. Will the Doctor and Bill stop the slaughter before they too are dragged into the icy waters?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Knock Knock
programme.desc: When a sinister landlord shows Bill and her friends the perfect house-share, they have no idea what lies ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Oxygen
programme.desc: Trapped on a space station with no oxygen, the Doctor, Bill, and Nardole are horrified to discover the automated spacesuits keeping them alive are also trying to kill them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Extremis
programme.desc: In the Vatican's secret library lies a book that causes the reader to immediately take their own life. When a translation makes its way online, the Vatican appeals to the Doctor for help.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Pyramid at the End of the World
programme.desc: The Doctor is offered a deal by an alien race that would save humanity.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Bill and Nardole set out on a deadly mission to rescue the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Empress of Mars
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives on Mars to discover that the Victorians have left their mark on the planet, causing a rift with the Ice Warriors.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Eaters of the Light
programme.desc: A hunt for the lost Ninth Roman Legion leads the Doctor, Bill, and Nardole into the middle of an ancient battle that could cast humanity into the dark forever.

programme.title: Doctor Who: World Enough and Time
programme.desc: The Doctor makes a rash decision when he witnesses the death of somebody during the event horizon of a black hole.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor Falls
programme.desc: The Doctor makes a final stand against an army of Cybermen, to protect a tiny band of humans from destruction.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Girl in the Fireplace
programme.desc: Madame de Pompadour's dreams are being haunted by a stranger called the Doctor. When she finds the court of Versailles under attack from clockwork droids she tries to summon her mysterious Doctor to save the day.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Rise of the Cybermen
programme.desc: When the Doctor, Rose and Mickey head back to 2006 because of a TARDIS malfunction, they soon realize the planet they once called home is run by a fascist society and that the Cybermen may be planning an invasion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Age of Steel
programme.desc: The Cybermen take control of London and start converting the populace. While Jackie falls under Lumic's control, the Doctor, Rose and Mickey are reduced to fugitives in a world of terror.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Impossible Planet
programme.desc: Rose finds herself further away from home than ever before, in the orbit of a Black Hole. Trapped with an Earth expedition and the mysterious Ood, the time-travellers face an even greater danger as something ancient beneath the surface begins to awake.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Satan Pit
programme.desc: Rose battles the murderous Ood and the Doctor finds his every belief being challenged to the core when the Pit beckons. With the planet threatening to fall into the Black Hole, the Doctor must make the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Doomsday
programme.desc: It's the end of an epic journey as two mighty armies wage war across the Earth, with the human race caught in the middle. But as an unstoppable terror emerges from beneath Torchwood, the Doctor faces an even greater dilemma.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Smith and Jones
programme.desc: The Doctor meets Martha Jones, a medical student in London, under unusual circumstances when her entire hospital is transported to the Moon.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Shakespeare Code
programme.desc: For Martha's first trip in the Tardis, the Doctor takes her back in time, to Elizabethan England. When they find William Shakespeare with a lost play, suspicions of evil are confirmed when deadly witch-like creatures are discovered.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Gridlock
programme.desc: The Doctor and Martha travel to New Earth in the distant future where they encounter sinister pharmacists and the Face of Boe.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Human Nature
programme.desc: The Doctor becomes John Smith, a human schoolteacher, to hide from alien villains in 1913 England.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Sacrifice Ice Tomb Secrets
programme.desc: Anthropologists discover a spectacular tomb hidden for centuries under the icy Russian permafrost, and when experts investigate, they encounter a bizarrely disfigured corpse among dozens of sacrificial victims linked to a gruesome Scythian death ritual.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Weird barren rings in the Namib Desert, an island the size of Manhattan that vanishes without trace and a lost city in the heart of the Amazonian jungle. What on Earth? Investigates six more mysteries captured from space.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to investigate a mysterious part of the ocean that's home to unexplained sightings of a terrifying sea monster. What they discover at this blue hole could lead them to an even stranger creature.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Mystery of the Spy Sabotage
programme.desc: A dangerous stretch of water in the Mediterranean is the resting place of an infamous sunken ship, and using the latest tech, Celine and Fabien Cousteau investigate if it was deliberately attacked by spies on a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Search for the Sunken UFO
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge technology to investigate the most credible UFO sighting in history, when a strange alien craft was spotted crashing into the ocean. What they discover might reveal hard evidence of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to hunt for a long-lost shipwreck in the Bermuda Triangle, and if their top-secret clues are right, they might uncover new evidence that explains the disappearances in this deadly and mysterious place.

programme.title: Ghosts of the Deep: Black Sea Shipwrecks
programme.desc: The largest ocean archaeological expedition ever has discovered a fleet of ancient ships perfectly preserved in the Black Sea’s mysterious depths, and as experts investigate this holy grail of shipwrecks, they uncover hidden secrets and lost treasures.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Temples of the Jungle
programme.desc: New technologies reveal the startling truth behind the largest temple ever built, Angkor Wat. Accompany experts as they uncover how this colossal structure was constructed and why one of the largest cities in the world was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Wrath of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: New evidence reveals if Attila the Hun was responsible for the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Inca Apocalypse: The Dark Evidence
programme.desc: The Inca capital of Cusco was said to be the site of untold gold and riches, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the secrets behind this mighty empire's fall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Pack Mentality
programme.desc: A single mother gets along with her handyman neighbor, until she gets a new man in her life and he becomes the owner of over fifty dogs. Accusations become threats, threats become attacks, and eventually the conflict comes to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Homicide City: Deadly Circle of Friends
programme.desc: The slaying of a young mother and her family provide detectives with a chilling link to another murder gone cold. Now, they must work fast to make an arrest before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide City: Family Tragedy
programme.desc: When 18-month-old Devon Manderach's body is found in a park outside Philly, police suspect the parents; but when her father calls looking for both the toddler and her mom, police quickly learn the case is more horrific and tragic than they imagined.

programme.title: Homicide City: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A 17-year-old aspiring artist is found dead in an abandoned house. A devastated family worries the case will never be solved, but 13 years later a lucky break in DNA technology points detectives in the right direction.

programme.title: Homicide City: Tragedy Strikes Lorena's
programme.desc: A birthday ends in tragedy when the beloved Nunez family is brutally murdered in their corner store. The triple-homicide orphans two girls and leaves detectives in the dark until a chance encounter breathes new life into the case.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: The Silver Man
programme.desc: The Atlanta Homicide team is called to a crime scene when a body wrapped head to toe in silver tape is discovered at a church playground in an upscale Atlanta neighborhood. Once the victim's identity is unveiled, a twisted love triangle is revealed.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: A Body at Devil's Corral
programme.desc: When police officer Rob and former beauty queen Joanna reunite years after high school, he seems to be her Prince Charming. But money troubles and infidelities bring this fairytale to a tragic end when one of them is found dead at Devil's Corral.

programme.title: A Grave New Year
programme.desc: When Mikarah Sanders is shot dead on New Year's Eve, investigators pound the pavement, learning that this blood-soaked holiday is the sad result of explosive rage.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: The Silver Man
programme.desc: The Atlanta Homicide team is called to a crime scene when a body wrapped head to toe in silver tape is discovered at a church playground in an upscale Atlanta neighborhood. Once the victim's identity is unveiled, a twisted love triangle is revealed.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: A Body at Devil's Corral
programme.desc: When police officer Rob and former beauty queen Joanna reunite years after high school, he seems to be her Prince Charming. But money troubles and infidelities bring this fairytale to a tragic end when one of them is found dead at Devil's Corral.

programme.title: A Grave New Year
programme.desc: When Mikarah Sanders is shot dead on New Year's Eve, investigators pound the pavement, learning that this blood-soaked holiday is the sad result of explosive rage.

programme.title: Homicide City: Deadly Circle of Friends
programme.desc: The slaying of a young mother and her family provide detectives with a chilling link to another murder gone cold. Now, they must work fast to make an arrest before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Betrayed: Motel Hell
programme.desc: Driven by youth, music, and her faith, Janet Chandler has dreams and aspirations of a life much larger than the small Midwestern town where she grew up. Sadly, those dreams are cut short when she's betrayed in the most horrific way possible.

programme.title: Betrayed: Suited for Murder
programme.desc: After two kids and two divorces, Charleston, West Virginia native Kathy Goble was making herself a priority for the first time in her life. However, her carefree ways soon catch up to her and she is betrayed in the most brutal way possible.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Design
programme.desc: 27-year-old single mom Laura Ackerson is looking to make a fresh start in Raleigh, North Carolina. She starts a new company and new relationships while battling for custody of her two young children. She also meets her untimely demise.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Predator of Pleasant View
programme.desc: Suzy Goulart, 23, is just getting by like everybody else in the scrappy Pleasant View apartment complex, where little dramas between friends and lovers add up to Suzy's fiery murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Final Curtain
programme.desc: From devoted mother, to passionate lover to larger-than-life stage actress, forty-year-old Pasinetta Prince plays many roles in her life and she relishes the spotlight. Until a personal betrayal draws the final curtain and ends her life.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Other Modesto Girl
programme.desc: The world knows about Laci Peterson and Chandra Levy, but what about the 'other' Modesto girl, Dena Raley-McCluskey, whose sudden disappearance was no less shocking - and mysterious.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hells Bells
programme.desc: Rhonda Smith is a beautiful, single woman who relies on the kindness of strangers at her new church to make her way in the world - until one of them strays from the path of righteousness and betrays her.

programme.title: Betrayed: Unholy Alliances
programme.desc: Church secretary Dorothy 'Dot' Finelli, 59, goes missing and turns up dead, as police explore if she's killed by a jealous new Internet date or somebody she's known for years within her own family circle.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: My Way or The Dead Way
programme.desc: Jodie is Edgar's secret high school crush. After a chance meeting, the two get together quickly. But money trouble, jealousy and a rebellious stepdaughter are about to turn this second chance at love into the high school reunion from hell.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Reduced to Ash
programme.desc: Julie and Keith's relationship stands the test of time. But after thirty-five years together, a profound restlessness seeps into their union's foundation. As these lifelong partners pursue very private adventures, their once fiery love is reduced to ash.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Harmony in Polyamory
programme.desc: An open-minded foursome soon discovers there's no harmony in polyamory, and someone will pay the ultimate price for free love.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: To Kiss or to Kill
programme.desc: April and Brad are happily married until her dreams of having a baby fall apart. Heartbroken, April turns to other men for consolation. One even moves in with the couple. But when Brad is ultimately replaced as the man of the house, everyone pays a price.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bruce Reynolds
programme.desc: Bruce Reynolds was a career criminal who, looking for his defining moment, planned a daring train robbery in 1963. Reynolds secretly organised a gang of 15 men to bring down a Royal Mail train carrying over two million pounds in cash.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging a House in Roanoke, VA, into Repurposed Housing Items
programme.desc: The entire Black Dog Salvage crew pitches in to help save parts of a house in Roanoke, VA. Main items include floors, trim, front porch columns, and a large built in cabinet. Back at the shop, Ted builds a fire pit and fountain from old syrup kettles.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down the Lincoln Cabin and Building a Dog Trot
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work to dismantle a barn built by Abe Lincoln's uncle around 1830.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Rescuing a Massive Barn, Finishing the Lincoln Cabin
programme.desc: The guys rescue a huge double-pen barn in St. Meinrad, Indiana. It's the biggest dogtrot-style barn they've ever faced. They have to fight through modern layers of tin and barnwood to get to the incredible, pioneer-era handhewn beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Repurposing Every Beam From a Pennsylvania Bank Barn
programme.desc: The guys take down a Pennsylvania Bank Barn in hopes of recovering the Long Beams and Huge Sleeper Logs that lay below. They are up against the weather, the machines malfunctioning and the weight of the logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Transforming a Shipping Container Into a Portable Barnwood Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys turn a used shipping container into a portable barnwood cabin. They use welding torches and old logs to transform the steel container into a home. Mark searches for the perfect red barnwood to cover it.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving a Pre-Civil War Log Cabin From West Virginia to Tennessee
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a pre-Civil War log cabin in Braxton County, West Virginia. They take it back to Lewisburg to refurbish the logs, then rebuild it for a client who collects historic homes in Elizabethton, Tennessee.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Getaway
programme.desc: A family attempts to build a 400-square foot cabin situated on a small island in Northern Idaho. Access to the property is limited and rough waters make it difficult to bring materials in. It's a race to the finish as winter hits the island early.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Conn., to conquer land and sea with a totally bonkers, Portuguese-inspired burger and a crazy coastal feast of chowder.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Good Eats: Major Pepper
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes a closer look at the king of spices, pepper, goes in search of the perfect peppermill, and examines the peculiar (but delicious) properties of pepper's essential oils.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fruit Ten from Outer Space
programme.desc: Chef Alton dissects this mysterious fruit, revealing a variety of applications for all of the pomegranate's juicy goodness, deciding that regardless of being way weird, pomegranates are definitely good eats.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fowl Territory
programme.desc: Alton shares his favourite weeknight meal, Cornish game hen, with an eye on food safety. From the grocery store to the leftovers, he shows how to shop, prep, cook, and even grill while providing guidelines and tools for proper food handling and clean up.

programme.title: Good Eats: Express Yourself
programme.desc: Alton Brown thought we could use some education about true espresso.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Honolulu
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores a bounty of multicultural delights in Honolulu.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Marseille
programme.desc: From beef stew to French pizza, Andrew Zimmern uncovers Marseille's edible icons.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: St. Louis
programme.desc: Andrew heads to St. Louis to get his fill of comfort food. He savors barbecued pig snoots, indulges in a modern Midwestern incarnation of traditional Italian fare and slurps noodles at one of the hottest new spots for East Asian fare.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew takes us around the world as he eats his way through Queens, NY. He digs into a monster Mexican sandwich, samples some of New York's best Egyptian cuisine and feasts on Argentine meats and authentic Taiwanese fare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Martha's Vineyard
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Martha's Vineyard, the island community off the coast of Cape Cod, Massachusetts, where the fresh local catch is delivered to restaurants each day.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Frankfurt
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Frankfurt where he samples everything from the classic frankfurter and apple wine to pork shoulder with sauerkraut and hand cheese with music.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tuscany
programme.desc: Andrew explores the cuisine of Tuscany, Italy, which is rooted in the tradition of 'cucina povera' or food made with local, high quality ingredients.

programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Just Passing Through/ Candace's Big Day
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create an orb that allows them to pass through solid objects and to ultimately, help them retrieve Mom's favourite guitar pick for her gig at the Mayor's Day Festival.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's in the House/ Minor Monogram
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb can't find Perry and decide to create the Perrytronic 3000, a mechanical structure that can assume any form.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Dude, Where's My Lab?
programme.desc: Tasha takes the entire family on a nice tech free beach weekend in the RV, but when Davenport discovers a solar flare headed in the Earth's direction, he secretly enlists the help of the Lab Rats.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Speed Trapped
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase sneak out to meet Marcus in Davenport's new self-driving sports car.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo's Jam
programme.desc: When Leo needs help asking a girl to the school dance, Adam and Chase step in to help, but the plan backfires when she falls for the wrong brother. The boys decide to settle their differences on the dance floor and each show off their best moves.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chore Wars
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase learn about chores and earn an allowance for the first time, then decide to host a yard sale to raise more money.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Birthday Fail
programme.desc: Adam, Bree, and Chase, who have never had a birthday party of their own, get so caught up in throwing a surprise party for Leo that they forget to invite him to it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Back From the Future
programme.desc: Leo, from seven years in the future, arrives in present day to prevent Adam, Bree and Chase from going on a mission from which they won't return.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Spy Fly
programme.desc: Leo turns to Bree for help after he mistakenly unleashes a swarm of robotic flies on the school. Adam and Chase turn their class assignment into a destructive competition.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Missin' the Mission
programme.desc: Leo finally goes a mission with Davenport and Eddy in an attempt to stop an underground gas leak. Adam, Bree and Chase struggle to escape from Principal Perry's detention lockdown.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Parallel Universe
programme.desc: Leo is inadvertently sucked into Davenport's new invention and transported into a parallel universe where Tasha is a brilliant inventor, Davenport is her insecure assistant, and Leo finally has bionic abilities.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Spike's Got Talent
programme.desc: Leo sets out to sabotage Chase but inadvertently releases Chase’s rampaging alter ego 'Spike' to wreak havoc on the school.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo vs. Evil
programme.desc: Leo follows Marcus to his secret lair to gather evidence that proves he’s bionic but ends up captured by Marcus.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs Fafnir!
programme.desc: In an attempt to humiliate the Victories, Fumiya challenges Dante to a battle that will be broadcast around the country.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Inspiration! Challenging Valt!
programme.desc: Blading superstar Valt Aoi visits Dante for a friendly battle before opening the Bey Carnival; once the tournament begins, the Victories will need to get the hang of the Hyper Stadium if they hope to win.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: The Grass Is Not Greener/ Woman to Woman
programme.desc: A dispute over front yard maintenance; a woman seeks reimbursement of medical expenses.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Thomas vs. Hadley
programme.desc: Although he is hoping to save his family with one woman by proving he is not the father of another woman's child, a Titusville, FL man also has doubts about his child with his current girlfriend.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Hubbard v. Watson Jr.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Kristin is suing Luke for the reimbursement of her wedding photography deposit, and Domenique is suing Brittany over a loan.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff dated the defendant and claims his ex is a violent woman who went to jail for attacking another woman in a jealous rage. He’s suing for damages to his truck.

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Love Your Show, Please Help Us

programme.title: Maury: Do I Have 18 Children? I'm Back for Two More Tests
programme.desc: Eugene is here to see if Jessica and Latoya are two of his eighteen children, the DNA test will reveal the truth. Then, Kaysandra put her dreams of higher education on hold when she had her son, but the father is denying the child.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Savage Stepsister!
programme.desc: Debra suspects that her ex-step sister Michaela has been messing around with her husband Travis. He claims that because of Michaela’s occupation as a stripper, it was no big deal.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: Cactus Cafe: Guy Forsyth and Jeska Bailey
programme.desc: A showcase of artists Guy Forsyth and Jeska Bailey — co-conspirators in life and song. Their music, stripped down to its essence, pairs two incredible voices, augmented only by Forsyth's master string work.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: Cactus Cafe: Steel Betty
programme.desc: This episode showcases Steel Betty, a distinctively-Austin band that keeps toes tapping with a mix of traditional bluegrass tunes and original folk compositions.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Friar's Club
programme.desc: Jerry borrows a jacket from a Friar's Club but ends up losing it. Kramer duplicates Da Vinci's sleeping patterns. Elaine finds herself overworked when Peterman hires a deaf employee.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Nose Job
programme.desc: Jerry is torn between his libido and his brain when he dates a vacuous model. George's girlfriend decides to get a nose job when Kramer points out her prominent facial feature. Kramer gets Elaine to help him retrieve a jacket.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Madame and Her Special Friend
programme.desc: Alan strikes up a friendship with Charlie's elderly neighbour, Norma, only to find himself on the defensive as she tries to win his affections. Meanwhile, Charlie tries to dissuade Jake from donating money to a televangelist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Something Salted and Twisted
programme.desc: Alan has a family dinner to celebrate the publication of a newspaper article that calls him a 'good doctor, neighbour and guy,' but he's crushed when his mother is not impressed. After drowning his sorrow in many drinks, he has a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: Mary 25
programme.desc: Charlie Bouton's last project for the Innobotics Corporation was a sexy female companion robot named Valerie 23. It almost put the company out of business when it went berserk and attacked someone.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: Final Exam
programme.desc: Dr. John Martin, a negotiator for the Department of Energy Nuclear Response Team, is called in when a disgruntled grad student takes hostages at a university.

programme.title: Sliders: The Chasm
programme.desc: Sliders slide into town that depends on the torture of Rembrandt.

programme.desc: Sam is a newsman who is receiving tip-offs from a serial killer after each of his murders.

programme.title: Quantum Leap: The Last Gunfighter
programme.desc: Sam becomes an 82-year-old Wild West legend who is challenged by a man from the past.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Line in the Sand
programme.desc: Mitchell, Carter and Teal'c arrive on a planet being threatened by the Ori. They decide that a line needs to be drawn and that the Ori must not be allowed to advance any further.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Road Not Taken
programme.desc: Carter ends up in an alternate universe where he changes the course of things.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Shroud
programme.desc: The SG-1 team learns of yet another world that has been visited by a Prior of the Ori. The team waits for the Prior's return, only to be shocked by his identity.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Bastille Day
programme.desc: Lee Adama goes to a prison ship to try to persuade the prisoners to help pump water.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Act of Contrition
programme.desc: A crisis forces Adama and Kara to finally face a ghost from their past.

programme.title: Sliders: Roads Taken
programme.desc: Colin and Rembrant see Quinn and Maggie land a little while later.
